reviews.comment:
Lugar muy agradable. Limpio y ordenado. Los playeros entre ellos no se han tratado de la mejor manera pero bue... No es la primera vez. Se dirigen entre ellos con palabras subidas de tono y muy poco profesionales. Sobre todo porque  yo andaba con menores y no es agradable que escuchen esos párrafos de bajo nivel social

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place. Clean and tidy. The beachgoers weren't the best to each other, but oh well... It's not the first time. They speak to each other using inappropriate and very unprofessional language. Especially since I was with children, and it's not pleasant for them to hear such low-class remarks.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16076228542632319706/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNxNG9tMEN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Nos estuvieron rebotando 20 minutos entre todos los empleados para no decirnos que sin consumir ( cosa que pensabamos hacer después de ir al baño) no te dejan utilizar los baños. Comprendo que estás actitudes siempre son decisiones de los dueños. Veníamos de horas de viaje y paramos justo en la peor estación de Gualeguaychú. Fuimos a una Oil que está sobre Primera Junta y nos atendieron de maravilla. Increíble el maltrato a los turistas.

(Translated by Google)
We were bounced around for 20 minutes by all the employees trying to avoid telling us that you can't use the restrooms without making a purchase (which we planned to do after using the restroom). I understand that these kinds of attitudes are always the owners' decision. We had been traveling for hours and stopped at the worst gas station in Gualeguaychú. We went to an Oil station on Primera Junta and they treated us wonderfully. The mistreatment of tourists is unbelievable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16076228542632319706/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5MDkydy1nRRAB
